SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $778.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,HUMAN SERVICE AGE NCY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKNEELY, JR., ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
